sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data available in sources

special_mechanics.name: Vertical Navigation
special_mechanics.description: Player must navigate exterior of building vertically to reach destination. If player fails to arrange date before reaching top, character is reset to ground level.

tier_notes: Tier 3 - Empirical/Qualitative. Wikipedia source provides only gameplay mechanics description without specific physics parameters. No movement speeds, gravity values, jump mechanics, or sub-pixel data documented. Source focuses on narrative gameplay loop and level design rather than physics implementation.
NOTE: Platform discrepancy: Game ID specifies 'genesis' but Wikipedia source documents SNES version (Super Nintendo Entertainment System). Genesis version may have different physics - recommend verifying correct platform version for accurate physics extraction.
